overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a dark, teal-lit forest environment with tribal wooden structures and spiked crystalline formations. The character explores a misty tribal settlement at night, illuminated by torchlight, eventually encountering enemy NPCs.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path toward the tribal settlement, passing torch-lit wooden structures

entered.detail: dense forest of tall pine trees creating a dark canopy overhead
elevated wooden platform with thatched roofing supported by wooden posts
lit torch on wooden post casting warm orange light on the path
large crystalline spikes with red and black coloring emerging from the ground
worn dirt path with patches of grass and stone

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt trail through a dense pine forest at night. Tribal wooden structures and burning torches line the right side of the path, while large spiked crystalline formations become visible in the distance. The atmosphere is misty and dark with a dominant teal color palette.

events.description: moving from open forest into densely structured tribal area with large spiked barricades

agents.ego_description: navigating through the tribal settlement, passing under large spiked archways and between wooden structures

entered.detail: multi-level ruined stone and wooden building with lit windows
crude wooden fence made of sharpened logs
dilapidated two-story structure with glowing windows and wooden scaffolding
large arching structure made of twisted crystalline spikes

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the tribal settlement, passing through narrow pathways lined with massive spiked crystalline formations and wooden barricades. The environment becomes more enclosed with ruined stone buildings and elevated wooden towers visible through the mist.

events.description: character spots enemy NPCs and enters alert stance, drawing weapon
character stops walking and pans camera to survey the area, looking up at the tower

agents.ego_description: spotting enemies ahead, stopping to assess the situation, then turning to look up at the large tribal tower while keeping weapon ready

notable_agents.action: enemy warrior standing guard with red marker overhead, facing the character
second enemy standing near the spiked barricade, observing the character

entered.detail: warm orange light emanating from a fire pit near the ruined building
rough wooden platforms and ladders attached to the ruins

segments.scene_description: The character encounters two enemy NPCs standing guard near the ruins and stops to assess the threat. The camera pans around as the character looks up at a massive tribal tower structure, revealing more of the fortified settlement with campfires burning and spiked defenses surrounding the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty, teal-lit pine forest that gradually tightens into a fortified tribal settlement. It begins along a winding dirt trail lined with burning torches and wooden structures, with large spiked crystalline formations emerging through the dark atmosphere. As the character moves deeper into the settlement, the path narrows and becomes more enclosed by massive crystals, wooden barricades, and the ruins of stone buildings. The scene then shifts as the character encounters two enemy guards near the ruins, causing the camera to pan upward toward a towering tribal structure. This final movement reveals the full scale of the fortified camp, complete with burning campfires and spiked defenses surrounding the area.
